content.text: {"component":"analysing","summary":"Analysing reads as a Symfony/Doctrine-backed analytics runtime with strong internal guards and containerized ops, but it lacks a README, visible CI evidence, and release tagging to confidently claim RC.","strengths":["Symfony + Doctrine application skeleton with public entrypoint and console","Containerization and Nginx configs for a runnable local environment","Robust internal guards (namespace, domain-hygiene, header) and QA tooling (PHPStan, PHPUnit, CS Fixer, Psalm)","Secrets scanning present via .gitleaks.toml","Smoke and unit tests exist alongside a QA environment check script"],"risks":["No README or public quickstart; external/product story is thin","CI/CD status unclear despite workflows directory","No git tags/releases; maturity and change history are opaque","Playwright config exists without package.json, suggesting e2e harness is not wired in this repo"],"next_actions":["Add a README with quickstart, run commands, architecture outline, and domain map links","Define and enable GitHub Actions to run qa:env, phpunit, phpstan, cs-fixer (dry-run), guards, and gitleaks on PRs","Introduce semantic version tags and a CHANGELOG, and create a release workflow","Either wire Playwright e2e (add package.json and CI job) or remove the unused config","Document container runbook (docker-compose up, health check, URLs) and add a CI smoke boot test","Promote docs/ content into the public docs site (or add a lightweight Antora module) and link from README"],"notes":["Assessment grounded only in repository files and current snapshot; no external tool outputs parsed","Component is enabled in registry; scheduled assessment runner integration is assumed but not evidenced here","Docs exist under docs/, but no README and no Antora nav/index are present in this repo","phpunit.xml.dist is present; prefer a concrete phpunit.xml (or CI override) with coverage thresholds"],"confidence":"medium","evidence_paths":["composer.json","public/index.php","src/Kernel.php","src/Domain","src/Service","src/ValueObject","config/routes.yaml","config/bootstrap.php","bin/console","docker-compose.yml","docker/Dockerfile","docker/nginx.conf",".github/workflows","phpstan.neon","phpunit.xml.dist","psalm.xml","tests/AnalyticsSmokeTest.php","tests/Unit",".gitleaks.toml","tools/analytics-namespace-guard.php","tools/analytics-domain-hygiene-guard.php","tools/analytics-php-header-guard.php","docs/analytics-core-doc-layer-map.md","docs/analytics-core-doc-namespace-target.md","docs/qa-environment.md"],"suggested_score_overrides":{"product":null,"architecture":null,"runtime":8.0,"qa":null,"ops":null,"market":null,"overall":null},"metric_updates":{"product":{"summary":"Product identity as an analytics/analysis-process Symfony app is clear from composer metadata, layered src layout, and focused docs, though public-facing narrative remains thin.","risks":["No README or quickstart blurs external understanding of value and scope","Absence of release tags weakens perceived product maturity"],"improvements":["Add a README with positioning, quickstart, example flows, and links to docs/","Publish a minimal feature map and usage examples to clarify boundaries"],"evidence":["composer.json","src/Domain","docs/analytics-core-doc-layer-map.md","docs/analytics-core-doc-source-domain.md"]},"architecture":{"summary":"A coherent Symfony + Doctrine architecture is present with layered directories and custom guard scripts enforcing namespaces, domain hygiene, and headers.","risks":["Architectural intent is implied by structure/guards but not formalized in ADRs","Guards rely on manual/script execution unless wired into CI"],"improvements":["Add a short architecture/ADR note in docs/ to capture decisions and boundaries","Run all guard scripts in CI to keep structure enforced continuously"],"evidence":["src/Domain","src/Infrastructure","src/DTO","config/bundles.php","tools/analytics-namespace-guard.php","tools/analytics-domain-hygiene-guard.php","tools/analytics-php-header-guard.php","composer.json"]},"runtime":{"summary":"Deployable runtime surface is evident (public/index.php, Kernel, routes, bin/console) with Docker and Nginx for local execution and smoke tests in tests/.","risks":["No README/runbook leaves runtime steps implicit","Pipeline boot/health checks are not evidenced","Playwright config without package.json suggests e2e browser tests are not wired"],"improvements":["Document run commands and endpoints in README and add a CI smoke boot test against the container","Either wire Playwright (add package.json and CI job) or remove the unused config","Expose and document a simple health endpoint checked in CI"],"evidence":["public/index.php","src/Kernel.php","config/routes.yaml","bin/console","docker-compose.yml","docker/Dockerfile","docker/nginx.conf","tests/AnalyticsSmokeTest.php"]},"qa":{"summary":"Testing and static analysis are configured (PHPUnit, PHPStan, Psalm, CS Fixer) with smoke and unit tests plus a QA environment checker.","risks":["Only phpunit.xml.dist is present; CI configuration and coverage thresholds are not visible","No published CI results or coverage report in the repo"],"improvements":["Add GitHub Actions to run qa:env, phpunit with coverage, and phpstan at level max","Commit or CI-generate a phpunit.xml with coverage thresholds and report artifacts","Include Psalm in CI to complement PHPStan"],"evidence":["phpunit.xml.dist","phpstan.neon","psalm.xml","composer.json","tools/qa/AnalyticsQaEnvironmentCheck.php","tests/Unit","tests/AnalyticsSmokeTest.php"]},"ops":{"summary":"Operational and governance posture is strong: container assets, secrets scanning, code hygiene/guard scripts, and a workflows directory for CI are present.","risks":["Actual CI job definitions and deployment automation are not evidenced","No release tags/changelog reduce operational traceability of changes"],"improvements":["Add CI pipelines for static analysis, tests, guards, and gitleaks on PRs","Add image build/push steps and a lightweight release workflow with semantic tags and CHANGELOG"],"evidence":[".gitleaks.toml",".github/workflows","docker-compose.yml","docker/Dockerfile","tools/analytics-namespace-guard.php","tools/analytics-domain-hygiene-guard.php","php-cs-fixer.dist.php","rector.neon"]},"market":{"summary":"The component aligns with an internal analytics/insight platform role and includes some docs, but outward-facing product narrative and packaging are minimal.","risks":["Proprietary license limits external adoption possibilities","Missing README and no releases/tags obscure market readiness"],"improvements":["Add a README with value proposition and integration examples","Introduce versioned releases and minimal change notes to signal stability"],"evidence":["composer.json","docs/analytics-core-doc-layer-map.md","docs/analytics-core-doc-namespace-target.md"]},"overall":{"summary":"Analysing shows strong structural and ops hygiene with a real runtime scaffold; wiring CI, release tagging, and a README would close the remaining pre-RC gaps.","risks":["Lack of README and public runbook","CI execution and coverage thresholds not evidenced","No version tags/releases"],"improvements":["Stand up CI for tests/analysis/guards and publish artifacts","Add semantic version tags and a CHANGELOG","Provide a concise README and link existing docs for onboarding"],"evidence":["composer.json","docker-compose.yml","tests/AnalyticsSmokeTest.php",".gitleaks.toml"]}}}
